message:
feat: Add CLI entry point and library root module

src/main.rs - Async CLI Entry Point:
- Tokio async runtime with #[tokio::main]
- Build metadata via vergen-gix constants:
  - VERGEN_BUILD_TIMESTAMP: compile time
  - VERGEN_GIT_SHA: git commit hash
  - VERGEN_GIT_DIRTY: uncommitted changes flag
  - VERGEN_RUSTC_SEMVER: rustc version
- Clap-based argument parsing with subcommands
- Command dispatch: usage, cost, token-accounts, doctor
- Tracing subscriber initialization with env-filter
- JSON logging mode via --json-output flag

Exit code mapping (CodexBar-compatible):
- 0: Success (command completed normally)
- 1: General error (network failure, I/O error)
- 2: Binary not found (provider CLI not installed)
- 3: Parse/config error (invalid arguments, bad JSON)
- 4: Timeout (web fetch exceeded limit)

Version output (--version/-V):
- Displays version from Cargo.toml
- Build timestamp and git SHA
- Dirty flag if uncommitted changes exist
- Rustc version used for compilation

Quickstart help (no arguments):
- Prints concise usage examples
- Shows top commands: usage, cost, doctor
- Points to --help for full documentation

src/lib.rs - Library Root:
- Module declarations for all crate components
- Public re-exports for library consumers
- Feature-gated test utilities (test-utils feature)
- Modules: cli, core, providers, render, storage, util, error

Architecture overview:
```
main.rs (entry) → cli/*.rs (commands) → core/*.rs (domain)
                                      → providers/*.rs (fetchers)
                                      → render/*.rs (output)
```

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
